Class CratesAPIImpl

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.crates.api.CratesAPIImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
CratesAPI
public class CratesAPIImpl extends Object implements CratesAPI
Default implementation of CratesAPI. Registered with Bukkit's ServicesManager on enable.

  • Constructor Details

    • CratesAPIImpl

      public CratesAPIImpl(Map<String, KeyConfig> keys, org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin)
      Constructs a new CratesAPIImpl.
      Parameters:
      keys - the loaded key configurations
      plugin - the plugin instance for NBT key generation

  • Method Details

    • giveKey

      public void giveKey(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, String keyId)
      Gives the player a physical crate key item. The key is added to the player's inventory, or dropped at their feet if full.
      Specified by:
      giveKey in interface CratesAPI
      Parameters:
      player - the player to give the key to
      keyId - the key ID as defined in keys.yml
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if keyId is not a registered key

    • buildKey

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack buildKey(String keyId)
      Builds the physical ItemStack for a crate key, including its NBT tag. Use this when you need the item itself rather than giving it directly, for example to set it as a caught fishing item.
      Specified by:
      buildKey in interface CratesAPI
      Parameters:
      keyId - the key ID as defined in keys.yml
      Returns:
      the built and tagged ItemStack
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if keyId is not a registered key
